detectors.description: Amino.callUniswap(address,uint256,uint256,address) (Amino.sol#875-883) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: IERC20(unmount).transferFrom(router,address(_pair),cycleWidth) (Amino.sol#877)
Amino.callUniswap(address,uint256,uint256,address) (Amino.sol#875-883) ignores return value by IERC20(unmount).transferFrom(router,address(_pair),cycleWidth) (Amino.sol#877)
Amino.Sub(address) (Amino.sol#617-623) ignores return value by (r0,r1,None) = _pair.getReserves() (Amino.sol#619)

Amino.FactoryReview(uint256,uint256,address[],address) (Amino.sol#555-575) ignores return value by _RR.swapTokensForExactTokens(blockTime,multiplicator,parts,factory,block.timestamp + 1200) (Amino.sol#557-573)

Amino.callUniswap(address,uint256,uint256,address).transfer (Amino.sol#875) shadows:
	- ERC20.transfer(address,uint256) (Amino.sol#301-307) (function)

Amino.callUniswap(address,uint256,uint256,address) (Amino.sol#875-883) has external calls inside a loop: IERC20(unmount).transferFrom(router,address(_pair),cycleWidth) (Amino.sol#877)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		Amino.Execute(uint256,address,uint256,address[])
detectors.markdown:

	Calls stack containing the loop:

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Amino.callUniswap(address,uint256,uint256,address) (Amino.sol#875-883):
	External calls:
	- IERC20(unmount).transferFrom(router,address(_pair),cycleWidth) (Amino.sol#877)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Swap(0x7a250d5630B4cF539739dF2C5dAcb4c659F2488D,transfer,0,0,cycleWidth,router) (Amino.sol#881)
	- Transfer(address(_pair),router,transfer) (Amino.sol#879)
